name: Master Kenji
dialogue: So. The Five Pillars stepped aside for you.
Daichi for discipline. Tsubaki for endurance. Kaen for focus. Hayate for courage. Akari for wisdom.
What they teach in pieces, I will test in full.
Show me what the road taught you. No shortcuts. No mercy.
preBattleLine: Master Kenji rises from his mat without a sound. The room goes still.
postDefeatDialogue: Kenji exhales, then bows — deeper than tradition demands.
There is nothing more I can teach you. The road from here is yours to draw.
The dojo — and the title — belong to you now.
